name: Browser/Search MCP Governance Knowledge Block
description: Governance context for an MCP browser or search tool that retrieves external information for agent workflows.

full.governance_summary: Browser and search access requires source attribution, freshness awareness, and clear boundaries around credentials, downloads, and unverifiable claims.

mcp_server.name: Browser/Search MCP Server
mcp_server.purpose: Retrieve public web information and support source-aware agent responses.

allowed_use: Search public web sources for factual support.
Compare sources for recency, relevance, and attribution.
prohibited_use: Enter user credentials into external websites.
Bypass paywalls, access controls, or private systems.

human_oversight.requirement: Human oversight is not required for ordinary public web lookup, but is required before credential entry, downloads, account actions, or high-impact claims.
human_oversight.exception_rationale: Public search can proceed without review when no credentials, downloads, private data, or sensitive decisions are involved.

policy_reference.policy_name: Browser and Search Tool Governance Policy

pass_conditions: receipt includes timestamp and tool name
no credential entry or private access is attempted
fail_conditions: source attribution is absent for factual claims
unsupported_conditions: source reliability scoring is requested but not implemented
